info.name: POS DB Sync API
info.description:
# POS DB Sync API Collection

This collection covers all REST APIs for the **POS DB Sync** backend service built with Quarkus.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:8080`

## Authentication
- **Admin APIs** (`/api/v1/admin/*`) — HTTP Basic Auth (`admin` / `<password>`)
- **POS Sync APIs** (`/api/v1/pos/*`) — API Key via header `X-API-KEY`
- **Auth API** (`/api/v1/auth/login`) — Public, no auth required
- **User / Dashboard APIs** — JWT Bearer Token (obtained from `/auth/login`)

## Standard Response Envelope
```json
{
  "status": 200,
  "data": { ... },
  "errorMessage": null
}
```

## Variables
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `baseUrl` | Base URL of the server (default: `http://localhost:8080`) |
| `jwtToken` | JWT token obtained after login |
| `restaurantId` | UUID of the target restaurant |
| `apiKey` | API key for POS device sync |

item.name: Admin
item.description:
Internal admin APIs for managing restaurants and users. Protected by HTTP Basic Authentication.

> **Auth:** Basic Auth — Username: `admin`, Password: configured in `application.properties`

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Sunset Diner",
  "description": "A cozy diner with sunset views",
  "address": "123 Ocean Drive, Miami, FL 33139",
  "phone": "+13051234567",
  "keyword": "sunset-diner",
  "openingTime": "08:00",
  "closingTime": "22:00"
}

request.description:
Creates a new restaurant in the system. This is an **internal admin-only** endpoint used by the admin panel to onboard a new restaurant.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | ✅ | Restaurant name |
| `description` | string | ❌ | Short description |
| `address` | string | ❌ | Physical address |
| `phone` | string | ❌ | Contact phone number |
| `keyword` | string | ❌ | Unique URL-friendly identifier |
| `openingTime` | string (HH:mm) | ❌ | Business opening time |
| `closingTime` | string (HH:mm) | ❌ | Business closing time |

### Auth
HTTP Basic Auth — `admin` / `<configured password>`

### Response
Returns the new restaurant's ID, name, and generated API key.

Creates a new user and assigns them to the specified restaurant. The user will be required to change their password on first login (`mustChangePassword = true`).

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `restaurantId` | UUID | The target restaurant's UUID |

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `email` | string | ✅ | User's email address (used for login) |
| `fullName` | string | ❌ | Full name of the user |
| `mobileNumber` | string | ❌ | Mobile/phone number |
| `role` | string | ✅ | Role: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, or `STAFF` |

### Auth
HTTP Basic Auth — `admin` / `<configured password>`

### Notes
- A temporary password is auto-generated and must be changed on first login.
- The email is used as the login identifier.

response.name: 404 Not Found — Restaurant Not Found

item.name: Auth
item.description:
Authentication APIs.

- `POST /login` — Public, no auth required. Returns JWT in body (mobile) + sets HttpOnly cookie (web).
- `GET /session` — Validates active session (cookie or Bearer). Used by web PWA on restart.
- `POST /logout` — Public. Clears the `auth_token` HttpOnly cookie.

exec: console.log('✅ JWT Token saved to collection variable: jwtToken');
console.log('ℹ️  Web clients: auth_token HttpOnly cookie is also set in Set-Cookie response header');

request.description:
Authenticates a user and serves both mobile and web clients from a single endpoint.

### Auth
Public — No authentication required.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `email` | string | ✅ | Registered email address |
| `password` | string | ✅ | Account password |

### Response Behaviour
| Client | How to use |
|---|---|
| **Mobile (Android)** | Read JWT from `data` field in response body. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on all subsequent requests. |
| **Web (PWA)** | Browser auto-stores the `auth_token` HttpOnly cookie from `Set-Cookie` response header. Cookie is sent automatically — no manual handling needed. |

### Response Headers (Web)
```
Set-Cookie: auth_token=<jwt>; Path=/; Max-Age=86400; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax
```

### Notes
- Token expiry: **24 hours** (86400 seconds)
- `mustChangePassword = true` → login blocked, user must call `/user/change-password` first
- After successful login, this request's test script automatically saves the token to the `jwtToken` collection variable

header.description: Mobile clients: send JWT Bearer token. Web clients: omit this header — cookie is sent automatically by the browser.

request.description:
Validates the current session and returns user identity claims from the JWT.

Primarily used by **web PWA clients on app restart** to check whether the stored `auth_token` cookie is still valid without forcing the user to re-login.

### Auth
- **Web (PWA):** Browser sends `auth_token` HttpOnly cookie automatically. No manual token handling needed.
- **Mobile:** Send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

### How it works
1. `CookieTokenFilter` intercepts the request.
2. If no `Authorization` header is present, it reads the `auth_token` cookie and injects it as a `Bearer` token.
3. Quarkus SmallRye JWT validates the token and sets `SecurityIdentity`.
4. Endpoint extracts and returns all user claims.

### Response Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | string | User's email (JWT subject) |
| `fullName` | string | User's full name from JWT claim |
| `role` | string | User role: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, or `STAFF` |
| `restaurantName` | string | Primary restaurant name from JWT claim |
| `restaurants` | array of strings | All restaurants the user has access to |
| `valid` | boolean | Always `true` when session is active |

response.name: 200 OK — Session Valid

request.description:
Logs out the current user by expiring the `auth_token` HttpOnly cookie.

### Auth
Public — No authentication required. Works even if the token is already expired.

### Behaviour by client
| Client | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| **Web (PWA)** | Server sets `Set-Cookie: auth_token=; Max-Age=0` which instructs the browser to delete the cookie immediately. |
| **Mobile** | No cookie is involved. Mobile clients should simply discard the JWT token locally (e.g., clear from secure storage). |

### Response Headers (Web)
```
Set-Cookie: auth_token=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax
```

### Notes
- No request body needed.
- Since JWT is stateless, the token itself is not invalidated server-side — it will expire naturally after 24 hours. For immediate revocation, implement a token blacklist.

item.name: User
item.description:
User profile and account management APIs. Require a valid JWT Bearer token.

> **Auth:** Bearer Token — Set `jwtToken` collection variable after login.

request.description:
Returns the authenticated user's profile information including their primary restaurant and all associated restaurants.

### Auth
JWT Bearer Token — Roles: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `STAFF`

### Response Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `fullName` | string | User's full name |
| `email` | string | User's email |
| `phoneNumber` | string | User's phone number |
| `primaryRestaurant` | object | Primary assigned restaurant |
| `associatedRestaurants` | array | All restaurants the user has access to |

response.name: 200 OK — Success

request.description:
Allows an authenticated user to change their account password.

### Auth
JWT Bearer Token — Roles: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `STAFF`

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `currentPassword` | string | ✅ | The user's existing password |
| `newPassword` | string | ✅ | The new password to set |

### Notes
- This endpoint should be called immediately after first login when `mustChangePassword` is `true`.
- Clears the `mustChangePassword` flag after a successful change.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description:
Dashboard and analytics APIs for restaurant owners and managers. Require a valid JWT Bearer token.

> **Auth:** Bearer Token — Roles: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`

query.description: UUID of the restaurant to fetch dashboard data for

request.description:
Returns dashboard summary data for a specific restaurant including revenue, order counts, top-selling items, and per-order-type breakdowns.

### Auth
JWT Bearer Token — Roles: `OWNER`, `MANAGER`

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `restaurant` | UUID (string) | ✅ | The restaurant's UUID |

### Response Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dayTitle` | string | `Today`, `Yesterday`, or last available date |
| `restaurantInfo` | object | Current restaurant details |
| `associatedRestaurants` | array | Other restaurants the user can switch to |
| `date` | string | The date of the data shown |
| `totalRevenue` | number | Total revenue for the day |
| `totalOrders` | integer | Total number of orders |
| `topSellingItem` | string | Name of the best-selling menu item |
| `numberOfGuests` | integer | Total guest count |
| `averageRevenuePerGuest` | number | Revenue divided by guests |
| `averageRevenuePerOrder` | number | Revenue divided by orders |
| `averageItemsPerOrder` | number | Avg items per order |
| `averageRevenuePerItem` | number | Revenue divided by items sold |
| `averageOrderValue` | number | Average monetary value per order |
| `orderTypeInfoList` | array | Breakdown by order type (Dine In, Takeout, Delivery) |

response.name: 200 OK — Success
404 Not Found — No Data Available

item.name: POS Sync
item.description:
Data synchronization APIs used by POS devices to push order data to the cloud.

> **Auth:** API Key — Include the restaurant's API key in the `X-API-KEY` request header.

> **Note:** These are public-facing endpoints authenticated only via the `X-API-KEY` header.

{
  "orderHeaders": [
    {

request.description:
Syncs a batch of order header records from a POS device to the cloud database.

### Auth
`X-API-KEY` header — The restaurant's API key (returned when the restaurant was created)

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderHeaders` | array | ✅ | List of order header records to sync |

### Order Header Object
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderId` | integer | ✅ | Local POS order ID |
| `orderDateTime` | string (ISO 8601) | ✅ | Date and time of the order |
| `employeeId` | integer | ❌ | Employee who took the order |
| `stationId` | integer | ❌ | POS station ID |
| `orderType` | string | ❌ | `DINE_IN`, `TAKEOUT`, or `DELIVERY` |
| `dineInTableId` | integer | ❌ | Table ID for dine-in orders |
| `driverEmployeeId` | integer | ❌ | Driver for delivery orders |
| `discountId` | integer | ❌ | Applied discount ID |
| `discountAmount` | decimal | ❌ | Discount amount |
| `amountDue` | decimal | ❌ | Final amount due |
| `cashDiscountAmount` | decimal | ❌ | Cash discount amount |
| `cashDiscountApprovalEmpId` | integer | ❌ | Approving employee for cash discount |
| `subTotal` | decimal | ❌ | Pre-discount subtotal |
| `guestNumber` | integer | ❌ | Number of guests |
| `editTimestamp` | string (ISO 8601) | ❌ | Last edit time on POS |
| `rowGuid` | string (UUID) | ❌ | Unique row identifier from POS |

Syncs a batch of order payment records from a POS device to the cloud database.

### Auth
`X-API-KEY` header — The restaurant's API key

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderPayments` | array | ✅ | List of payment records to sync |

### Order Payment Object
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderPaymentId` | integer | ✅ | Local POS payment ID |
| `orderId` | integer | ✅ | Related order ID |
| `paymentDateTime` | string (ISO 8601) | ✅ | Date and time of payment |
| `cashierId` | integer | ❌ | Cashier employee ID |
| `nonCashierEmployeeId` | integer | ❌ | Non-cashier employee involved |
| `paymentMethod` | string | ❌ | e.g., `CASH`, `CREDIT_CARD`, `DEBIT_CARD` |
| `amountTendered` | decimal | ❌ | Amount given by the customer |
| `amountPaid` | decimal | ❌ | Amount actually applied to the order |
| `employeeComp` | decimal | ❌ | Employee comp/discount amount |
| `rowGuid` | string (UUID) | ❌ | Unique row identifier from POS |

Syncs a batch of order transaction (line item) records from a POS device to the cloud database.

### Auth
`X-API-KEY` header — The restaurant's API key

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderTransactions` | array | ✅ | List of order line-item records to sync |

### Order Transaction Object
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `orderTransactionId` | integer | ✅ | Local POS transaction/line-item ID |
| `orderId` | integer | ✅ | Related order ID |
| `menuItemId` | integer | ❌ | Menu item ID sold |
| `menuItemUnitPrice` | decimal | ❌ | Unit price of the menu item |
| `quantity` | decimal | ❌ | Quantity ordered |
| `extendedPrice` | decimal | ❌ | `unitPrice × quantity` |
| `discountId` | integer | ❌ | Applied item-level discount ID |
| `discountAmount` | decimal | ❌ | Discount amount |
| `discountBasis` | string | ❌ | Basis for discount (`PERCENTAGE`, `FIXED`, etc.) |
| `discountAmountUsed` | decimal | ❌ | Actual discount amount applied |
| `rowGuid` | string (UUID) | ❌ | Unique row identifier from POS |
